TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Steve_Bracey, title = Steve_Bracey, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Steve_Bracey} }

S.FORM: Steve Bracey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1950 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Steve Bracey, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2006) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Steve Bracey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1950 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Steve Bracey, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2006) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕte*e βraʦ~ʨej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, s~ɕte*e βraʦ~ʨej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
